title: Perform Basic Arithmetic Operations
user_story: As a user, I want to enter two numbers and select an operation (addition, subtraction, or multiplication), so that I can quickly calculate the result.
acceptance_criteria: The interface displays input fields for two numeric values.
The interface provides buttons or dropdown options for addition, subtraction, and multiplication.
Clicking a 'Calculate' button processes the inputs and operation.
The correct mathematical result is displayed on the screen after calculation.
Empty inputs are handled gracefully by showing an error message.

title: Handle Division and Edge Cases
user_story: As a user, I want to perform division operations with proper error handling, so that the calculator remains stable when dividing by zero or receiving invalid data.
acceptance_criteria: The interface includes an option for division.
Dividing any number by zero displays a clear 'Division by zero is not allowed' message.
Entering non-numeric characters (letters, symbols) triggers an input validation error.
The calculator does not crash or freeze when invalid inputs are submitted.

title: Clear Inputs and Results
user_story: As a user, I want to clear all entered values and displayed results with a single action, so that I can start a new calculation easily.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Clear' or 'Reset' button is visible on the interface.
Clicking the button empties all input fields.
The result display area is cleared after clicking the button.
The calculator returns to its initial ready state without requiring a page refresh.
